titleStmt.title: SII 20.130: original edition by G. S. Gai
No. 130. (B.K. No. 42 of 1935-36.) LAKSHMĒŚVAR, SHIRHATTI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: On a pillar in the utsava hall in the Sōmēśvara temple.

summary.p: This damaged record is dated in the king's regnal year 2, Plavagma, Pushya, Puṇṇame, Thursday, Uttarāyaṇa-saṁkrānti, lunar eclipse, corresponding to A.D. 1187, December 17. There was no eclipse on this day and the saṁkrānti occurred on December 26.

The inscription registers a gift of oil by the Ayvattakkalu to the temple of Kattamēśvaradēva and also a gift of betel-leaves and money to the temple by the Five-Hundred. The gift was made over to Aghōraśaktidēva.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
© svasti śrī prithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirāja paramēsvaraṁ paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷa
kaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmatribhuvanamalla vīrasōmēsvaradēvara vijayarājya muttarōttarābhivriddhipra
varddhamānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . 2 neya plavaṁga saṁvatsa radabhyaṁtara puṣya suddha pu
ṇnami brihaspativāramuttarāyaṇasaṁkrāṁti byatīpāta sōmagrahaṇa kūḍida tithiyoḷu me
vīḍina śrī kattamēsvaradēvargge Ayvattokkalu neradirddu naṁdādīvige naḍevaṁtāgi sauṭigeṇneyaṁ paṁcamaṭha
sthānavaśēsadēvaputrakaradhyakṣadoḷu Akhaṁḍitatapaścaraṇanirataniyamōktarappa śrīmadaghō raśa
ktidēvara pādaprakṣāḷanaṁ māḍi dhārāpūrvvakaṁ koṭṭaru dēvara vīḷayakkeleya hēṟeṁgayvatteleyaṁ
Ayinūrvvaru koṭṭaru . mattaṁ dēvara Aṁgabhōgakke kāmiseṭṭiya gāṇavaṁ sarbbābā
dhāpa hāra śrīmānyavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ dēvapu
trakaru salisuvaru Āḍida dina voṁmāneṇneyaṁ koṭṭu su
khadiṁdirpparu . mattaṁ śrīmadayinūrbbaru
dēvara nivēdyakke
koṟavaḍuUdakkaṁ samasta manyakke khaṁḍugakke voṁdu so
ṭigeyaṁ koṭṭaru . haṣubiya dēvargge honnaṁ
koṭṭaru .
Digital edition of SII 20.130 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
